diagrams.title: Basic Bus Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how CPU, memory, and I/O devices are connected through the system bus
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fundamental bus architecture and component interconnection

diagrams.title: Memory Read Operation Timing
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing sequence of signals during a memory read operation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding bus cycle phases and signal timing for read operations

diagrams.title: Bus Arbitration Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the decision process in bus arbitration when multiple devices request the bus
elements: Grant bus to highest priority device
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how bus conflicts are resolved and priority is determined
